channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:January 02
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:January 02

item.title: Feasts of the Saints, Saint Seraphim of Sarov, 2015-01-15
item.description: :Feasts of the Saints. Personal reflections about my patron, St Seraphim of Sarov, on his day. The most impressive thing about him was his pastoral endurance and his pastoral approach. His great virtues of struggle, humility and purity helped him to always be in the moment of the resurrection and to endure all things and all people and never get tired. Also a little autobiographical information, including how not to fast when you are a college student!
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Feasts of the Saints. Personal reflections about my patron, St Seraphim of Sarov, on his day. The most impressive thing about him was his pastoral endurance and his pastoral approach. His great virtues of struggle, humility and purity helped him to always be in the moment of the resurrection and to endure all things and all people and never get tired. Also a little autobiographical information, including how not to fast when you are a college student!
